original_title: JSON parse crash: Expected property name or '}' in JSON at position 27 (line 1 column 28)
original_description: The /api/user/preferences endpoint returned malformed JSON. The app crashes when trying to parse the response body. This breaks the settings page entirely.

console.message: [API] JSON parse failed: Expected property name or '}' in JSON at position 27 (line 1 column 28)
